title: leontodon orophilus
intro: Leontodon orophilus, also known as mountain hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The medicinal properties of Leontodon orophilus include its ability to act as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory, making it useful in treating conditions such as urinary problems and digestive issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. Leontodon orophilus can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and it is also used in some traditional folk remedies for its medicinal properties.
